context_reviewer.decision_note: Only typed contexts actually referenced by the 36 deliberate C-level relationships were accepted; no empty or quantity-padding contexts were created.

source_reviewer.decision_note: Every context was checked against exact official object IDs, raw JSON locators, snapshot hashes, date precision, and attribution caveats.

contexts.scope_note: Material label is taken only from official object-record medium fields; it does not imply a shared workshop, contact, or transmission.
contexts.educational_value: Lets learners compare how oil-based paint operates on different supports and in different periods without turning material similarity into historical influence.

time_scope.historical_scope: The cited batch examples are dated from probably 1519 through 1923; the material category itself is not assigned an origin or end date.

place_scope.description: This reviewed comparison context does not assert a shared historical place.
